prayer.title: 🕙️ Morning Prayer
prayer.modeh_ani: מודה אני לפניך — I gratefully thank You, living and eternal King, for returning my soul within me with compassion.
prayer.blessing: Blessed are You who girds Israel with strength — fortify me for the work ahead.
prayer.psalm: Psalm 118:25: 'Lord, save us! Lord, grant us success!'
prayer.proverb: Proverbs 11:1: 'Dishonest scales are an abomination to the Lord, but accurate weights are His delight.'
prayer.intention: Help me see people as You see them — partners, not obstacles.
prayer.closing: Baruch atah Adonai — Blessed are You, Lord, who renews creation daily with goodness.

mre.title: 📊 MRE Trading
mre.thesis: Fear at 43, bull regime intact. All assets holding. SPY in bull mode but QQQ sideways. XLK and XLF in bear regimes - watch for sector rotation. No new buy signals today - patience required.
mre.summary: Markets fearful but structure remains bullish. No action items today.

items.summary: Anthropic released Claude Sonnet 4.6 5 days ago, continuing the fast pace of AI model development to compete with OpenAI and Google.

items.summary: Dispute between Defense Department and Anthropic over AI safety and defense contracts worth $200M. Claude is the most widely used AI on classified systems.
items.relevance: AI safety vs. national security applications - important precedent for industry
